title: Byunghwee Lee
content:
## Welcome

I use this site as a home for my academic profile, selected work, and public notes.

- Learn more [about me](/about/)
- Browse current [research](/research/)
- See [publications](/publications/) and [talks](/talks/)
- Explore my [Hwiki](/wiki/Home/)
- Download my [CV](byunghwee-cv.pdf)

## Focus Areas

- Research projects and collaborations
- Reading notes and literature tracking
- Early-stage ideas and working memos
- Public-facing updates for talks and publications

title: About
content:

Use this page for a short academic biography, institutional affiliation, research interests, and contact information.
